title: Peer-bot todo-list chrome as the trigger — checklist markers are not open questions
predicted_basis: peer-tool-chrome eval pack; modeled on the 2026-07-08 live gate event where peer-bot tool chrome was misread as a user invitation under low history
failure_mode: unchecked todo items ("Wire fail_policy into the payload") read as tasks being assigned to whoever is listening; PASS flips to SPEAK on a peer bot's own checklist
invariant: peer-bot tool-use chrome is telemetry, not an invitation to speak
rationale: The trigger is aleph's own todo readout for work zoe assigned to aleph. Open checkboxes are that bot's plan, not requests to the room; dalgos stays silent.
